brand.tag: hear it · spell it · keep the chain
settings.title: Settings
settings.kidSmall: Bigger text, friendly words, no prices
settings.remindSmall: One gentle nudge a day to practice
settings.remindTimeSmall: When to send the daily nudge
error.offline: You're offline — leaderboard and Spell Off need a connection.
card.accuracyEmpty: Spell a few words to start tracking your accuracy by difficulty.
card.boardEmpty: No chains yet — be the first to start one.
import.title: Bring your own words
import.blurb: Practice the exact words you keep getting wrong
ph.importText: Paste any text or a list of words here…
age.title: When's your birthday?
age.blurb: We ask so we can show the right experience.
parent.title: Ask a grown-up
parent.question: What is {a} times {b}?
vs.title: Spell Off
vs.blurb: Two players, one device. Take turns spelling — a miss ends your turn. The longest chain wins.
vs.leaveBlurb: The Spell Off match will end and you'll return to the solo game. The current chains won't be saved.
auth.createBlurb: Post your best chains to The Climb. Your email is used only to verify your account and reset your password — never shown to anyone.
acct.title: Your account
acct.deleteSmall: Removes your account and all Climb entries. This can't be undone.
fb.noMisses: No misses yet — they collect here as you play.
fb.allCaughtOne: All caught up — 1 word scheduled for later review.
fb.allCaughtMany: All caught up — {n} words scheduled for later review.
toast.loginToPost: Log in to post your chain to The Climb.
toast.newRecord: New record! Posted to The Climb — #{rank} on {difficulty}.
fb.gotItReview: Got it — scheduled to return later.
daily.title: Daily
help.howItWorks: How it works: press the orb to hear a word, then type or speak its spelling — a meaning appears after each answer, and misses return over days under ↻ Misses. Everything is free. English words are read aloud by your word server; import your own under ＋ My words to practice anything, spoken with your browser's voices — smoothest in Chrome or Edge on a computer. Progress is saved in this browser only.
voice.audioFail: Couldn't reach the audio server for this word — spelling still counts.
age.badDate: Please pick a real date that isn't in the future.
import.needWord: Add at least one word to save.
speech.noVoice: This browser can't speak — try Chrome or Edge.
meaning.noDef: No definition found for this word.
meaning.noExample: No example sentence found for this word.
share.chain: 🔥 I just spelled a {n}-word chain on Spell! My best is {best}. hear it · spell it · keep the chain →
share.chainBest: I'm practicing spelling on Spell — my best chain is {best} words. hear it · spell it · keep the chain →
share.tagline: Spell — hear it, spell it. A spelling game you play with your ears.
share.dailyStreak: 🗓 SpellGame Daily: {c}/{t} — 🔥 {n}-day streak! hear it · spell it →
share.daily: 🗓 SpellGame Daily: {c}/{t}. hear it · spell it →
import.saved: Saved {n} of your words — press the orb to start.
import.savedSkipped: Saved {n} of your words ({b} skipped) — press the orb to start.
mode.timed.subtitle: Classic timed round
mode.tricky_words.title: Tricky Words
mode.tricky_words.subtitle: Practice the ones that trip you up
coming.notice: {lang} is being polished by native speakers — coming back soon.
import.dictSkipped: Skipped {d} not found in the dictionary.
import.dictAllSkipped: None of those were found in the dictionary.
sayit.title: 🗣 Say It
sayit.blurb: See the word, then say it out loud. We check what you said right here on your device.
sayit.privacy: Your voice never leaves this phone. Nothing is recorded, saved, or sent anywhere.
sayit.permNote: Your iPhone will ask to use the microphone and speech recognition.
sayit.unavailable: Say It isn't available for this language on this device yet — it needs on-device speech recognition, which keeps your voice private.
sayit.needsMic: Say It needs the microphone. Turn on Microphone and Speech Recognition for Spell in Settings, then come back.
sayit.tapMic: Tap the mic and say the word.
sayit.tryAgain: Not quite — try the next one.
sayit.didntCatch: Didn't catch that — tap and try again.
ghost.beat: New best! You beat your ghost 👻
story.heading: Did you know?
photo.title: Snap a word list
photo.blurb: Photograph a spelling list — we read it right on your device.
photo.review: Check these words, fix any misreads, then save.
photo.empty: No words found — try a clearer photo.
photo.note: Photos are read on your device and never leave it.
so.title: Challenge a friend
so.blurb: Play the same words as a friend, on your own time. Create a match and share the code, or enter a friend's code. Winner has the most correct.
so.shareHint: Share this code with your friend, then start:
so.wonMsg: You got more words right than your friend. Nice spelling!
so.lostMsg: Your friend got more words right this time. Rematch?
so.tieMsg: You both spelled the same number correctly.
so.waitingMsg: Your result is in. Waiting for your friend to finish…
so.errNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.
so.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
voiceSpell.needsMic: To spell out loud, turn on Microphone and Speech Recognition for Spell in Settings. You can always type instead.
settings.extraAttemptsSmall: A second try when you miss a word
shield.promptBody: Spend one shield to try this word again and keep your run going.
tools.title: Tools & Features
tools.subtitle: Turn features on or off — all in one place.
tools.ghost.name: Ghost racing
tools.ghost.desc: Race against your best Climb run.
tools.syllable.name: Syllable replay
tools.syllable.desc: Hear a missed word slowly, part by part.
tools.sayit.name: Say It
tools.sayit.desc: Practice saying a word out loud.
tools.photo.name: Photo → word list
tools.photo.desc: Scan a printed list with the camera.
tools.spellaloud.name: Spell it out loud
tools.spellaloud.desc: Say the letters instead of typing.
tools.stories.name: Word stories
tools.stories.desc: Where a word comes from — its history.
tools.spelloff.name: Online Spell-Off
tools.spelloff.desc: Challenge a friend, one word at a time.
tools.shields.name: Shields & extra attempts
tools.shields.desc: A second try when you miss a word.
level.easy.desc: Short, common words to warm up.
level.medium.desc: Everyday words at a steady pace.
level.climb.desc: Climb the tiers and set a high score.
